question_text:
Subdomain Visit Count

Given count-paired domains, return counts for each subdomain.
explanation: Iterate through each domain, split into subdomains, and use a hash map to accumulate counts.

test_cases.expected_output: ["901 mail.com","900 google.mail.com","951 com","50 yahoo.com","1 intel.mail.com","5 wiki.org","5 org"]
